name: Cardholder Data Encrypted at Rest
description: Ensures cardholder data is encrypted at rest using strong cryptography (PCI DSS 3.4)
query: SELECT id, name, engine, encryption_enabled, data_classification FROM databases WHERE data_classification = 'cardholder_data' AND (encryption_enabled = false OR encryption_enabled IS NULL)
remediation: Enable encryption at rest for all databases containing cardholder data. Use AES-256 or stronger encryption.
